activityLogsPage.title: Activity Logs
activityLogsPage.subtitle: Track every login, page view, and action recorded across the system.

auditLogsPage.title: Audit Logs
auditLogsPage.subtitle: A detailed record of every create, update, and delete action performed across the system.

systemResetPage.title: Danger Zone
systemResetPage.subtitle: Irreversible system-wide actions. Proceed with extreme caution.
systemResetPage.warning: This will permanently delete all data — products, orders, customers, suppliers, deliveries, and accounts (except your own admin account) — and cannot be undone.
systemResetPage.confirmDialogBody: This action is permanent and cannot be reversed. All business data will be deleted.
systemResetPage.resetSuccess: System reset complete. {{count}} accounts were deleted.
